nodes.context: Greek-American criminal organization operating in New York City, involved in gambling, loansharking, extortion.
Greek criminal organization led by Peter Kourakos, precursor to the Velentzas Organization.
New York Mafia family that allied with the Velentzas Organization, providing protection.
New York Mafia family that rivaled the Velentzas Organization over gambling territory.
Albanian criminal organization based in Bronx and Westchester, rival of the Velentzas Organization.
Greek-American criminal organization in Philadelphia, allied with the Velentzas Organization.

edges.context: The Velentzas Organization originated from the Kourakos clan.
The Lucchese family provided protection to the Velentzas Organization in exchange for a share of gambling profits.
The Gambino family resisted Velentzas' expansion into their gambling territory, with Gotti threatening to kill Velentzas.
The Rudaj Organization attacked Velentzas associates to take over gambling rackets in Astoria.
The Rudaj Organization was supported by the Gambino family.
The Philadelphia Greek Mob is listed as an ally of the Velentzas Organization.
